name: marsaifestival
description: Projet Mars AI Festival - React + Express TypeScript

scripts.prestart:
echo "
🚀 Démarrage de MarsAiFestival...
   Backend  → http://localhost:5500
   Frontend → http://localhost:5173
"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm -C backend run dev" "npm -C frontend run dev"
scripts.lint: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c magenta,red "npm -C frontend run lint" "npm -C backend run lint"
scripts.test: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,blue "npm -C frontend test -- --run" "npm -C backend test"
scripts.check: concurrently -n format,lint,tests -c yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run format:check" "npm run lint" "npm run test"
